main-castle-room.name: Main Castle Room
main-castle-room.description: You are in the main room of a castle.  It has four doors and a staircase. There is one door on each wall and a fireplace with a pile of logs. A walking stick is leaning against a chair. The west door has a knob above it. A bunch of dried roots are hanging from the ceiling beams.

backyard.name: Backyard
backyard.description: You are in a shabby backyard with tall fencing all around.  There is a pile of twisted metal debris and cloth scraps along the back by a shed and an oddly-shaped bucket in one corner.

bathroom.name: Bathroom
bathroom.description: You are in a large bathroom with a clawfoot tub, a pedestal sink, and a toilet.  There is a large mirror above the sink.  The entire room is filthy, the tub, sink, and mirror are all coated with grime.  There are a large variety of bottles and jars on the edges of the sink and tub. You notice one particular unlabelled bottle beside the sink and a paper packet as well.

town.name: Town
town.description: You are in a small town square. A busy port is visible across the street.

busy-city.name: Busy City
busy-city.description: You are in a busy city. The streets are crowded with people and carriages.

flower-fields.name: Flower Fields
flower-fields.description: You are in a field of flowers. The air is filled with the scent of blooming roses.

???.description: All that you can see is grey fog. You can't see anything around you.

unlabelled-bottle.name: unlabelled bottle
unlabelled-bottle.description: A small glass bottle with a cork stopper. It is filled with orange liquid.

twisted-metal.name: twisted metal
twisted-metal.description: A piece of twisted metal debris.

oddly-shaped-bucket.name: oddly-shaped bucket
oddly-shaped-bucket.description: A strange item that appears to be made of leather, but looks like it has had something heavy dropped on it.

paper-packet.name: paper packet
paper-packet.description: A small paper packet with a waxy coating. It appears to contain a white powdery substance.

fireplace.name: fireplace
fireplace.description: A large stone fireplace. The fire has burned very low.

logs.message: Add the logs to the fireplace. The fire almost immediately flares up
logs.newDescription: A large stone fireplace. A fire burns brightly. As you stare into the flames, you start to see that they form a face.

walking-stick.message: You poke the fire with the walking stick. It exclaims "Ouch! That hurts! Stop poking me with that stick!"
walking-stick.newDescription: A large stone fireplace. It contains a surprisingly talkative fire.

cloth-scrap.name: cloth scrap
cloth-scrap.description: A small scrap of white cloth.

knob.name: knob
knob.description: A small knob above the west door. On its' four sides, it has blue, red, green, and black paint blots.

chair.name: chair
chair.description: A wooden chair with a cushioned seat. The cushion is covered in a faded floral pattern.

action.rest: You sit down in the chair and find yourself dozing off.

shed.name: shed
shed.description: A small wooden shed. It is not in great repair.

action.open: You try to open the shed, but it is locked.

clawfoot-tub.name: clawfoot tub
clawfoot-tub.description: A large clawfoot tub. It is lined with grime and has weird green stuff growing on it.

action.use: You turn on the tub and water splashes out, rinsing some of the grime off.

pedestal-sink.name: pedestal sink
pedestal-sink.description: A white porcelain pedestal sink. It is covered in grime and has a variety of bottles and jars on its' edges.

action.use: You turn on the sink and water splashes out, rinsing some of the grime off.

toilet.name: toilet
toilet.description: A white porcelain toilet. It is just as filthy as the rest of the bathroom.

action.use: At least the toilet appears to be functional.

mirror.name: mirror
mirror.description: A large mirror above the sink. It is coated with grime, you can only see a hint of your reflection in it.

cloth-scrap.message: You use the cloth scrap to wipe some of the grime off the mirror. You can now see your reflection clearly.
cloth-scrap.newDescription: A large mirror above the sink. You can see your reflection in it. You notice that you appear significantly older than you should.
